blended.narrative: Silver Star is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 7 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 2,669 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
